author: danielknopik
content: <@412614104222531604> when you have time, can you please take a look at `blob-devnet-0`? a couple of nodes seem to be stuck/crashlooping again

author: danielknopik
content: I fixed a bug that caused LH to not partial message publish completed columns in some cases, causing excess traffic as peers kept sending cells even though the column was already complete. After deployment network traffic dropped quite a bit :) cc <@106441459183423488> <@1425510242749251606> <@833706406699073536>

author: marcopolo__
content: Ah it wouldn’t let peers know it already completed its column?

author: danielknopik
content: yeah, in some cases when the initial getBlobs returned all blobs
